examples: It doesn't look like such a moonscape.
Dodge being hit in an asteroid belt, and get ready to land as you approach a deserted moonscape.
Watson is a red desert moonscape on the Nullarbor Plain at the eastern end of the world's longest stretch of straight rail track, 478km (297 miles).
Meanwhile our imaginary solar-panel factory joins the moonscape of abandoned property in Detroit.
Having crossed a moonscape of cracked grey mud and many more dunes, we reach the first place with any real vegetation.
